chunks.text: A Decentralized SDN Architecture for the WAN (EECS-2024-240) by Alexander Krentsel, Nitika Saran, Bikash Koley, Subhasree Mandal, Ashok Narayanan, Sylvia Ratnasamy, Ali Al-Shabibi, Anees Shaikh, Rob Shakir, Ankit Singla and Hakim Weatherspoon.
chunks.question: What is the title of the 2024 technical report?
chunks.answer: A Decentralized SDN Architecture for the WAN.

chunks.text: Evaluating Software Switches: Hard or Hopeless? (EECS-2018-136) by Vivian Fang, Tamás Lévai, Sangjin Han, Sylvia Ratnasamy, Barath Raghavan and Justine Sherry.
chunks.question: Who are the authors of the 2018 report on software switches?
chunks.answer: Vivian Fang, Tamás Lévai, Sangjin Han, Sylvia Ratnasamy, Barath Raghavan, Justine Sherry.

chunks.text: Hold 'em or Fold 'em? Aggregation Queries under Performance Variations (EECS-2015-267) by Gautam Kumar, Ganesh Ananthanarayanan, Sylvia Ratnasamy and Ion Stoica.
chunks.question: What topic does the 2015 report EECS-2015-267 address?

chunks.text: SoftNIC: A Software NIC to Augment Hardware (EECS-2015-155) by Sangjin Han, Keon Jang, Aurojit Panda, Shoumik Palkar, Dongsu Han and Sylvia Ratnasamy.
chunks.question: What is the purpose of SoftNIC?
chunks.answer: To augment hardware with a software NIC.

chunks.text: Netcalls: End Host Function Calls to Network Traffic Processing Services (EECS-2012-175) by Justine Sherry, Daniel C. Kim, Seshadri S. Mahalingam, Amy Tang, Steve Wang and Sylvia Ratnasamy.
chunks.question: What does the 2012 report Netcalls introduce?
chunks.answer: End host function calls for network traffic processing.

chunks.text: A Survey of Enterprise Middlebox Deployments (EECS-2012-24) by Justine Sherry and Sylvia Ratnasamy.
chunks.question: What is the focus of the 2012 survey report?

chunks.text: Design and Implementation of a Consolidated Middlebox Architecture (EECS-2011-110) by Vyas Sekar, Norbert Egi, Sylvia Ratnasamy, Michael Reiter and Guangyu Shi.
chunks.question: What does the 2011 report design and implement?

chunks.text: Reducing Network Energy Consumption via Rate-Adaptation and Sleeping (EECS-2007-128) by Sergiu Nedevschi, Lucian Popa, Gianluca Iannaccone, Sylvia Ratnasamy and David Wetherall.
chunks.question: How does the 2007 report propose to reduce energy consumption?

chunks.text: Inference of Multicast Routing Trees and Bottleneck Bandwidths using End-to-end Measurements (CSD-98-1019) by Sylvia Ratnasamy and Steven McCanne.
chunks.question: What is inferred in the 1998 report CSD-98-1019?
chunks.answer: Multicast routing trees and bottleneck bandwidths.
